title: Add a custom domain to a branch
excerpt: description: Point a custom domain to a specific branch deployment of your Cloudflare Pages project. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. In this guide, you will learn how to add a custom domain (`staging.example.com`) that will point to a specific branch (`staging`) on your Pages project. This will allow you to have a custom domain that will always show the latest build for a specific branch on your Pages project.
